name: dev-rigor-stack
description: A six-gate delivery discipline for AI coding agents, plus the skills it invokes.

skills.name: dev-rigor-stack
skills.role: the stack itself — orchestrates the loop + release gate

skills.name: coder-tdd-qa
skills.role: BUILD gate — test-first engineering + QA standards

skills.name: audit-lite
skills.role: REVIEW lane — fast single-pass audit of a small change

skills.name: audit-team
skills.role: REVIEW lane — multi-role deep audit for high-blast units

skills.name: gauntletgate
skills.role: REVIEW lane + release gate — adversarial stage-gate (lite/walkthrough/full)

external_dependencies.name: ponytail
external_dependencies.author: DietrichGebert
external_dependencies.install: Not bundled (not our work to redistribute). Fetch on request with the installer flag `--with-ponytail` / `-WithPonytail`, which clones this repo and adds its skills (skills only; always-on hooks not wired). Or install it yourself.
external_dependencies.note: Third-party code-minimalism / anti-bloat plugin. The dev-rigor-stack skill references the 'ponytail ladder' (PLAN) and 'ponytail governs code scope'. Supplies the stack's only active minimalism discipline. The stack degrades gracefully without it.
